about.description: Web UIs since 2021 (LETI IS dept.); commercial experience since 2023. B2B and product interfaces, design systems and complex UIs, Vue/React, TypeScript. Growing toward Senior IC. Belarus · remote · open to relocation · hybrid in Minsk.

items.description:
Product: web console based on OpenShift Console Platform for the CIS market.
• Console redesign to a new design system; predictable UX/UI delivery in sprints.
• Dependency migration; resolved 500+ high-severity npm vulnerabilities per audit.
• Cypress e2e: cross-domain authentication.
• Plugin template — faster plugins and onboarding.
• Onboarded a new team member.

NDA · outsourcing/outstaff: full apps (trade/industry, web3), TMA on Vue (SCSS, Lottie), data-heavy admin UIs.
• Component library from Figma; owned architecture, handoff to support (waterfall).
• ChatGPT streaming UI + async ChatGPT API integration.
• SEO, Google Analytics; cross-browser & iOS fixes.
• AWS S3 pre-signed uploads.
• Small projects: deadlines and urgent hotfixes.

~1k users; one product from scratch + modules in three projects.
• Excel→web, unified PostgreSQL model; thousands of rows, recursive queries.
• Bootstrap: hierarchical/Excel-like tables, single-screen undo/redo.
• Support tickets; TS, NestJS, Sequelize, Kanban.
